CREATE TABLE test_bin (id UInt32, value UInt32) ENGINE = Memory;
SELECT id, bin(value) AS binary_representation FROM test_bin WHERE value > 0;
CREATE TABLE float_data (id UInt32, float_value Float32) ENGINE = Memory;
SELECT id, bin(toFloat32(float_value)) AS binary_rep FROM float_data;
SELECT id, bin(toFloat32(float_value) + 1) AS binary_plus_one FROM float_data INNER JOIN test_bin ON float_data.id = test_bin.id;
SELECT id, (SELECT bin(value) FROM test_bin WHERE id = float_data.id) AS binary_value FROM float_data;
SELECT id, bin(CAST(value AS Int64)) FROM (SELECT value FROM test_bin WHERE value < 256);
SELECT bin(0) AS binary_zero, bin(1) AS binary_one;
